playbook.intent: A 30-min recurring 1:1 that produces (a) one growth or blocker insight, (b) one decision or commitment from the PM, (c) updated team-development notes. Not a status update — explicitly not.
playbook.scope: A 30-min recurring 1:1 that produces (a) one growth or blocker insight, (b) one decision or commitment from the PM, (c) updated team-development notes. Not a status update — explicitly not.

success-criteria.criterion: First 5 minutes have zero status content
One growth or blocker topic owned by them

stage.name: Refuse status mode
stage.intent: Set the conversation tone before the meeting starts.

tasks.task: Ban status updates explicitly ('we have the standup for that')
Frame the time as theirs to spend

stage.decision-gate: Advance when the first 5 minutes have zero status content.

stage.name: Pick one growth thread
stage.intent: One growth or blocker topic, not five.

tasks.task: Surface the topic that matters most to them this week
Use a question-bank cue if needed (tenure-appropriate)
Probe with 'what would make that easier?'

stage.decision-gate: Advance when the topic is named and they own framing it.

stage.name: Decide one thing
stage.intent: PM exits with one decision or commitment.

tasks.task: Convert their need into one PM action
Make the commitment explicit ('I will do X by date')
Write it down on the spot

stage.decision-gate: Advance when the commitment is written down in their view.

stage.name: Risk + signal note

tasks.task: Note any retention or burnout signal

stage.decision-gate: Advance when notes are filed in the right register (not lost in the 1:1 doc).

stage.name: Update team-development log

tasks.task: Note recurring themes for quarterly review

stage.decision-gate: Required: per-person growth tracker updated within 24 hours.

extra.value: {human: faion get-content hold-a-focused-11-with-a-team-member --format md, agent: faion get-content hold-a-focused-11-with-a-team-member --format context, json: faion get-content hold-a-focused-11-with-a-team-member --format json}
[{version: 1.0.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: 'Initial v2 playbook drafted from F-059-063 chunk-04, role-manager-manager'}]
